Document:
# The Imperial Coalition (TIC)
[color=#999999][italic]"Nothing will stand in the way of the Coalition, that is certain, especially not those 'TDF' or 'Solarians'."[/italic][/color] [color=#999999][italic]- Lieutenant Commander Lights-The-Torch, TIC Space Navy[/italic][/color]
The Imperial Coalition is the original government of the Triad sector and a number of other sectors, until they lost control of the Triad sector in 2823. Governing with an iron fist, the Coalition is defined by a rigid code of honor where disputes are settled by the blade. To ensure the sector's total submission, they maintain a chilling silence by making every dissonant voice disappear. The Imperial Coalition is a government that heavily focuses on military might and advancement, hence why you may find scattered research and ruins in the area with left behind tech on abandoned stations or brass asteroids. Despite this, they have an interesting look on advanced technology such as lasers and plasma weapons, believing that over-reliance on technology like this will make them weak as a nation and military. Plasma and laser weapons are only usually seen on higher-ranking Coalition military members or those who have proved themselves to the Coalition. They have a number of companies under their name, serving the Coalition through material acquisition, weapons manufacturing, or even research of new technology, though their techniques are out-of-date and usually technologically outclassed by the [textlink="SD" link="SolarianDirective"] or [textlink="TDF" link="TriadDefenseForce"], but that does not make them any less of a force to be reckoned with.
They currently are in a cold-war with the nearby [textlink="Solarian Directive" link="SolarianDirective"], the Coalition waiting for the perfect moment to strike the [textlink="SD" link="SolarianDirective"], then the [textlink="TDF" link="TriadDefenseForce"], to finally bring the Triad sector back into the Coalition's hands.
